NAME

instrument_cov.c - TODO: Add Doxygen documentation for SanitizerCoverage instrumentation.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void __sanitizer_cov_trace_pc_guard (uint32_t *guard)
void __sanitizer_cov_trace_pc_guard_init (uint32_t *start, uint32_t *stop)

Detailed Description

TODO: Add Doxygen documentation for SanitizerCoverage instrumentation.

Provides runtime hooks for code coverage tracking via Clang's SanitizerCoverage. Needs documentation for:

  • Coverage data collection hooks
  • Integration with logging system
  • Instrumentation runtime behavior

Definition in file instrument_cov.c.

Function Documentation

void __sanitizer_cov_trace_pc_guard (uint32_t * guard)

Definition at line 21 of file instrument_cov.c.

21                                                      {
22   if (guard == NULL || *guard == 0U) {
23     return;
24   }
25 
26   asciichat_instr_log_pc((uintptr_t)__builtin_return_address(0));
27 }




References asciichat_instr_log_pc().






void
  __sanitizer_cov_trace_pc_guard_init (uint32_t * start, uint32_t *
  stop)


Definition at line 29 of file instrument_cov.c.


29                                                                           {
30   if (start == NULL || stop == NULL || start == stop) {
31     return;
32   }
33 
34   if (*start != 0U) {
35     return;
36   }
37 
38   uint32_t counter = 1U;
39   for (uint32_t *it = start; it < stop; ++it) {
40     if (*it == 0U) {
41       *it = counter++;
42     }
43   }
44 }
